title: Missing 2FA status column in the User Management CSV export
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: matthew.azzopardi_vp (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, when an admin downloads the CSV export from the User Management portal, the resulting file does not include a column indicating whether a user has Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) enabled or disabled. While this information is visible within the Monday.com interface, it is stripped out during the export process, leaving a gap in the data available for offline analysis.

What are you trying to achieve

We are currently enforcing a security mandate where all users must configure 2FA for their accounts. My goal is to use the CSV export to quickly filter and identify non-compliant users so we can facilitate targeted follow-ups. Without this column, we are forced to manually audit each profile within the UI, which is inefficient and prone to human error. Including a “2FA Status” column in the export would allow us to maintain our security compliance at scale.
